entries.sentence: We ordered a takeaway for dinner.
entries.chinese: takeaway = 外卖；我们晚餐点了外卖。

entries.sentence: Turn off the tap after washing.
entries.chinese: tap = 水龙头；洗完后关上水龙头。

entries.sentence: This soup has a salty taste.
entries.chinese: taste = 味道；这汤有咸味。

entries.sentence: The price includes tax.
entries.chinese: tax = 税；价格包含税。

entries.sentence: A tear ran down her face.
entries.chinese: tear = 眼泪；一滴眼泪从她脸上流下来。

entries.sentence: This technique helps beginners swim.
entries.chinese: technique = 技巧；这种技巧帮助初学者游泳。

entries.sentence: The telephone rang during dinner.
entries.chinese: telephone = 电话；电话在晚餐时响了。

entries.sentence: The past tense is used in this sentence.
entries.chinese: tense = 时态；这个句子使用了过去时态。

entries.sentence: Our tent stayed dry in the rain.
entries.chinese: tent = 帐篷；我们的帐篷在雨中保持干燥。

entries.sentence: The school term ends in July.
entries.chinese: term = 学期；这个学期七月结束。

entries.sentence: I sent a text to my sister.
entries.chinese: text = 短信；我给姐姐发了一条短信。

entries.sentence: The thief took a bicycle.
entries.chinese: thief = 小偷；小偷偷走了一辆自行车。

entries.sentence: This thing belongs in the kitchen.
entries.chinese: thing = 东西；这个东西应该放在厨房。

entries.sentence: The thought made him smile.
entries.chinese: thought = 想法；这个想法让他笑了。

entries.sentence: She borrowed a thriller from the library.
entries.chinese: thriller = 惊险小说；她从图书馆借了一本惊险小说。

entries.sentence: My throat hurts when I swallow.
entries.chinese: throat = 喉咙；我吞咽时喉咙疼。

entries.sentence: He cut his thumb while cooking.
entries.chinese: thumb = 拇指；他做饭时割伤了拇指。

entries.sentence: A thunderstorm arrived after lunch.
entries.chinese: thunderstorm = 雷暴；午饭后来了雷暴。

entries.sentence: Put a tick next to the answer.
entries.chinese: tick = 对号；在答案旁边打一个对号。

entries.sentence: He chose a blue tie for the wedding.
entries.chinese: tie = 领带；他为婚礼选了一条蓝色领带。

entries.sentence: She wore black tights with her dress.
entries.chinese: tights = 连裤袜；她穿黑色连裤袜配连衣裙。

entries.sentence: The bus timetable is on the wall.
entries.chinese: timetable = 时间表；公交时间表在墙上。

entries.sentence: Open a tin of beans for lunch.
entries.chinese: tin = 罐头；午饭打开一罐豆子。

entries.sentence: He left a tip for the waiter.
entries.chinese: tip = 小费；他给服务员留了小费。

entries.sentence: Take a tissue from the box.
entries.chinese: tissue = 纸巾；从盒子里拿一张纸巾。

entries.sentence: The title of the story is short.
entries.chinese: title = 标题；这个故事的标题很短。

entries.sentence: I had toast for breakfast.
entries.chinese: toast = 烤面包片；我早餐吃了烤面包片。

entries.sentence: I hurt my toe on the table leg.
entries.chinese: toe = 脚趾；我的脚趾撞到了桌腿。

entries.sentence: The toilet is at the end of the hall.
entries.chinese: toilet = 厕所；厕所在大厅尽头。

entries.sentence: Slice the tomato for the salad.
entries.chinese: tomato = 番茄；把番茄切片放进沙拉。

entries.sentence: The hot tea burned my tongue.
entries.chinese: tongue = 舌头；热茶烫到了我的舌头。

entries.sentence: A toothache kept him awake.
entries.chinese: toothache = 牙痛；牙痛让他睡不着。

entries.sentence: Pack a toothbrush for the trip.
entries.chinese: toothbrush = 牙刷；旅行时带上一把牙刷。

entries.sentence: Our topic today is healthy food.
entries.chinese: topic = 话题；我们今天的话题是健康食物。

entries.sentence: Take a torch for the dark path.
entries.chinese: torch = 手电筒；带上手电筒走那条黑路。

entries.sentence: The city tour starts at ten.
entries.chinese: tour = 游览；城市游览十点开始。

entries.sentence: Hang the wet towel by the window.
entries.chinese: towel = 毛巾；把湿毛巾挂在窗边。

entries.sentence: The old tower overlooks the river.
entries.chinese: tower = 塔；那座古塔俯瞰着河流。

entries.sentence: The runners waited on the track.
entries.chinese: track = 跑道；跑步者在跑道上等待。

entries.sentence: The trainer showed us a warm-up exercise.
entries.chinese: trainer = 教练；教练给我们示范了热身练习。

entries.sentence: Training starts at six every morning.
entries.chinese: training = 训练；训练每天早上六点开始。

entries.sentence: Put the paper in the trash can.
entries.chinese: trash can = 垃圾桶；把纸放进垃圾桶。

entries.sentence: This fashion trend began last year.
entries.chinese: trend = 趋势；这种时尚趋势去年开始。

entries.sentence: The card trick surprised the children.
entries.chinese: trick = 戏法；纸牌戏法让孩子们很惊讶。

entries.sentence: The broken lock caused trouble.
entries.chinese: trouble = 麻烦；坏掉的锁造成了麻烦。

entries.sentence: The trunk of the tree was wide.
entries.chinese: trunk = 树干；这棵树的树干很宽。

entries.sentence: He plays the trumpet in the band.
entries.chinese: trumpet = 小号；他在乐队里吹小号。

entries.sentence: The truth was hard to explain.
entries.chinese: truth = 真相；真相很难解释。

entries.sentence: The paint came in a small tube.
entries.chinese: tube = 管；颜料装在一支小管里。

entries.sentence: Tuna tastes good in a sandwich.
entries.chinese: tuna = 金枪鱼；金枪鱼夹在三明治里很好吃。
